welcomeAdjustHint: You can change language and appearance anytime using the header.
aboutIntro: Master's student in Robotics, Cognition, and Intelligence at TUM, with a bachelor's in Engineering Cybernetics from the University of Stuttgart. Research background in deep learning through my bachelor's thesis, a student research assistant role, and university projects. Close to one year of full-time industrial experience in product development at FARO Europe GmbH & Co. KG (3D laser scanning). Volunteer work with the TUM Social AI Club; earlier experience as a youth soccer head coach.
